chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 790 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 24.10.2023 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
